title: Thai Carrot Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make stir fry dish, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner. This recipe combines the sweetness of carrots with the savory flavors of Thai cuisine.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Thai red curry paste and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the carrots and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes until slightly tender.
Add the caramelized onions and stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
Pour in the fish sauce and soy sauce, and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the stir-fry to a serving platter and garnish with sliced green onions.
